testcase.name: User Authentication › should successfully login and logout as GM
User Authentication › should successfully login and logout as Player
User Authentication › should allow re-login after logout
User Authentication › should handle invalid credentials
User Authentication › should redirect to login when accessing protected route while unauthenticated
User Authentication › should redirect to dashboard when accessing login while authenticated
User Authentication › should persist authentication across page reloads
User Authentication › should navigate to games page after login
Character Creation Flow › Player can create a character after being approved
Character Creation Flow › GM can create NPC characters
Phase Management Flow › GM can create a phase
Phase Management Flow › GM can activate a phase
Phase Management Flow › GM can view phase history
Player Views Phase History › Player can view phase history list
Player Views Phase History › Player can view details of a common_room phase
Player Views Phase History › Player can navigate back from phase details
GM Creates Game & Recruits Players › GM can create a game
GM Creates Game & Recruits Players › GM can start recruitment for a game
GM Edits Game Settings › GM can edit game title and description
GM Edits Game Settings › GM can edit game settings (genre, max players)
GM Edits Game Settings › GM can toggle anonymous mode
GM Manages Game Applications › GM can view pending applications
GM Manages Game Applications › GM can approve multiple applications
GM Manages Game Applications › GM can reject applications
Common Room Flow › GM can create a post in Common Room
Common Room Flow › Player can view GM posts in Common Room
Common Room Flow › Player can comment on GM post
Private Messages Flow › Players can send private messages to each other
